tests.source_program:
define i32 @test(i32 noundef %0) {
%1:
  %2 = and i32 noundef %0, 2147483647
  %3 = icmp eq i32 %2, 0
  %4 = shl i32 noundef %0, 1
  %5 = select i1 %3, i32 0, i32 %4
  ret i32 %5
}

issue.title: [InstCombine] Missing fold for (a << k) ? 2^k * a : 0 --> 2^k * a
issue.author: k-arrows
